title: selaginella cordifolia
intro: Selaginella cordifolia, also known as 'False Daisy' or 'Water Spangle', is a type of ancient, non-vascular plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family and is native to tropical Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella cordifolia include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Selaginella cordifolia is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
